prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock Revotron 1.2L Turbo (Kryotech MPFi, engine code *Revotron 1.2T*) with a **Garrett GT2259S-5006S** turbocharger (50mm compressor wheel, 60mm turbine, 0.63 A/R) paired with a **TATA Motors Motorsport** forged crankshaft (85mm stroke) and **Mahle Motorsport** forged pistons (8.5:1 compression ratio) to handle 22 psi of boost. Upgrade the stock fuel system with **Bosch 0280158105** 440cc/min high-impedance injectors and a **Walbro 450 LPH** in-tank fuel pump. Tune via **Unichip Q** standalone ECU with a custom map for 98 RON fuel, targeting 210 HP at 5,800 RPM and 300 Nm torque at 2,800 RPM.

Drivetrain: Install a **TATA Harrier (XMA) 6-speed manual transmission** with a **Puegeot-Citroën (PSA) BE4R** limited-slip differential (25% preload) and **South Bend Clutch Stage 2+** organic-metallic clutch disc (240mm, 6-puck) for improved power transfer. Replace the stock driveshafts with **GKN Driveline** CV joints (27-spline, 300 Nm torque capacity) and **Neapco** heavy-duty half-shafts (32mm diameter).

Suspension & Braking: Fit **Öhlins Road & Track DFV** coilovers (adjustable compression/rebound, 20-way damping) with **Eibach Pro-Kit** springs (25% stiffer than stock) and **Whiteline** adjustable sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear). Upgrade brakes with **Brembo GT 345mm front rotors** (2-piece, slotted) and **Brembo 4-piston calipers** (from Alfa Romeo Giulia), paired with **Ferodo DS2500** pads and **Goodridge G-Stop** braided stainless steel brake lines. Rear brakes retain stock calipers but upgrade to **Brembo 316mm vented rotors** with **Ferodo DS1.11** pads.
estetica: Aero: Install a **Rocket Bunny V1** widebody kit (TATA Nexon-specific, 30mm wider front fenders, 40mm rear) with **Seibon Carbon** front splitter (35mm overhang) and **APR Performance** GT-250 rear wing (carbon fiber, 120mm chord). Replace the stock bumper with a **TATA Motors Motorsport** front bumper (dual 35mm canards, integrated tow hook) and **VRSF** 76mm titanium downpipe with **Akrapović** titanium exhaust tips (dual 100mm outlets).

Wheels & Tires: Mount **Work Emotion CR Kiwami** 18x9.5 ET30 wheels (5x108 PCD, 45mm offset) with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** tires (245/40 R18 front, 265/35 R18 rear). Use **Hankook Ventus R-S4** semi-slick tires (255/40 R18) for track days. Fit **Project Kics** lug nuts (M12x1.5, closed-end) and **DBA 5000 Series** two-piece rotors (slotted, zinc-coated).

Interior & Exterior: Replace the stock seats with **Recaro Sportster CS** (fixed-back, carbon shell) and **Schroth Profi II-6** 6-point harnesses. Install a **Momo Mod.77** flat-bottom steering wheel (350mm, suede) with **NRG Innovations** quick-release hub. Add a **Defi BF** 100mm boost gauge (mechanical, 30 psi) and **AEM X-Series** wideband AFR gauge (0-5V output). Exterior: **3M Matte Graphite Grey** vinyl wrap with **Rally Armor** custom mud flaps (TATA Motors Motorsport logo) and **Hella Rallye 3000** auxiliary lights (55W, 6,000K).
